question_text: Let (рқ‘Ӣ, рқ‘Ң) be a random vector having joint probability density function given by рқ‘“рқ‘Ӣ,рқ‘Ң(рқ‘Ҙ, рқ‘Ұ) = { 4 вҒЎвҒЎвҒЎifвҒЎрқ‘Ҙ2 вүӨрқ‘Ұ< 1вҒЎandвҒЎ вҲ’1 вүӨрқ‘ҘвүӨ1 0вҒЎвҒЎвҒЎвҒЎotherwise. Which of the following statements is/are true?

options.A: рқ‘Ӣ has the same distribution as вҲ’рқ‘Ӣ
options.C: The correlation coefficient between рқ‘Ӣ and рқ‘Ң is 0
